name: The Cosmic Frobenis Condition

phase_0.boundary_condition: The event horizon of the universe itself — what encloses all distinctions and makes their coherence possible.

VINIT.justification: Void/uninitialized state: no space, no time, no distinctions. The monad before emanation.

TANCH.chosen_element: The cosmic microwave background (CMB) — the boundary that contains the whole observable universe
TANCH.justification: Terminal anchor ⊤: the closed boundary that defines the edge of what can be known. The last scattering surface where light decoupled from matter.

AFWD.chosen_element: Cosmic expansion — the scale factor a(t) increasing
AFWD.justification: Forward morphism →: directed transformation toward a target. The universe's arrow of time, entropy increase, structure formation.

AREV.chosen_element: Gravitational collapse — regions where a(t) reverses locally
AREV.justification: Contravariant ←: reverse/descent transformation. Black holes, gravitational wells, the coagula phase where expansion reverses.

CLINK.chosen_element: Causal structure — light cones and causal ordering
CLINK.justification: Composition ∘: sequential chaining of morphisms. Events are ordered by causal influence; one event's future light cone intersects another's past light cone.

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The metric tensor g_μν — the self-reference of spacetime to itself
IMSCRIB.justification: Identity id: self-recognition. The metric encodes how spacetime knows itself; it is both the arena and the description of the arena.

FSPLIT.chosen_element: The Big Bang singularity — one initial condition splits into two branches
FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication δ: one thing branches into two or more distinct paths. The singularity splits into: (1) the expanding universe branch (EVALT), (2) the contracting/collapsing branch (EVALF).

FFUSE.chosen_element: Cosmic recurrence — the two branches (expansion and collapse) reconstitute the original singularity
FFUSE.justification: Multiplication μ: branches reconstitute the original input exactly. FFUSE(FSPLIT(singularity)) = singularity. The universe's round-trip: Big Bang → expansion → collapse → Big Bang.

EVALT.chosen_element: Expansion phase — the universe's affirmative branch
EVALT.justification: True/affirmative branch: positive evaluation. The universe expands; entropy increases; structure forms. The successful branch.

EVALF.chosen_element: Contraction phase — the universe's negative branch
EVALF.justification: False/negative branch: negative evaluation. The universe contracts; entropy decreases (locally); structure dissolves. The failed/reversed branch.

ENGAGR.chosen_element: The critical point at the Big Crunch — both expansion and contraction held simultaneously
ENGAGR.justification: Both simultaneously: a paradice held without resolution. At the moment of maximum compression, the universe is both expanding (in its past light cone) and contracting (in its future light cone). The B-state of cosmology.

IFIX.chosen_element: The cosmic microwave background radiation — the permanent record of the universe's structure at recombination
IFIX.justification: ROM fixation: permanent, append-only, cannot be undone. The CMB is the sealed record of the universe's early state. Every photon in it is a fixed witness to what was.

phase_2.split_input: The initial condition: one unified quantum state before time
split_outputs: Expansion branch: a(t) > 0, entropy increasing, structure forming
Contraction branch: a(t) < 0, entropy decreasing, structure dissolving
phase_2.fuse_element: Cosmic recurrence (the Big Crunch and subsequent Big Bang)
phase_2.fuse_result: The singularity is reconstituted exactly: the two branches merge back into the unified quantum state. The universe returns to its initial condition.

phase_3.void_description: 00 — The pre-Big-Bang state: no spacetime, no metric, no distinctions. Pure potentiality before actualization.
phase_3.true_description: 01 — Expansion phase: the universe is expanding, entropy increasing, time flowing forward, structure forming. Affirmative state.
phase_3.false_description: 10 — Contraction phase: the universe is contracting, entropy decreasing locally, time flowing backward, structure dissolving. Negative state.
phase_3.both_description: 11 — The critical point at the Big Crunch: both expansion and contraction are simultaneously true. The universe is both expanding (in its past) and contracting (in its future). A paradice held without resolution.

steps.domain_action: The singularity exists as pure potential, before any distinction between space and time.
The metric tensor g_μν emerges as the universe's self-description — spacetime knows itself through the curvature it encodes.
Inflation begins. The scale factor a(t) increases exponentially. The universe expands forward in time.
The initial singularity splits into two branches: expansion (EVALT) and contraction (EVALF). The universe's fate bifurcates.
The expansion branch succeeds. Matter and radiation decouple. Galaxies form. Stars ignite. Structure emerges from quantum fluctuations.
The contraction branch fails (in this universe). Gravity would eventually reverse expansion, but the dark energy term prevents it. The branch remains latent, not actualized.

At the critical point (if the universe were to reach maximum expansion and begin contracting), both branches would be held simultaneously. The B-state of cosmology: both expansion and contraction true at once.
Gravitational collapse occurs locally in regions of high density. Black holes form. Entropy is hidden behind event horizons.
Causal structure chains events together. The light cone of the Big Bang intersects the light cone of every event in the universe. All causality is chained to the initial singularity.
Causal structure chains events together. The light cone of the Big Bang intersects the light cone of every event in the universe. All causality is chained to the initial singularity.

If the universe were to contract (the Big Crunch), the two branches would fuse back together. The expansion and contraction phases would reconstitute the singularity. The round-trip would be complete: singularity → expansion → contraction → singularity.

The cosmic microwave background radiation is sealed as the permanent record of the universe's state at recombination. Every photon carries the imprint of the early universe. The record cannot be undone or rewritten.
The event horizon of the observable universe forms the boundary that contains all distinctions. Beyond it, causality is severed. The universe is enclosed by its own light cone.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: General Relativity (Einstein's field equations) — translates the energy-momentum tensor T_μν into spacetime curvature R_μν. Intentions (matter and energy) are compiled into geometry.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Gravitational waves and light cones — how spacetime regions communicate causally. Disturbances in the metric propagate at the speed of light. Information is exchanged through curvature.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The metric tensor g_μν and the Ricci curvature R_μν — how the universe stores its state. Every point in spacetime remembers the cumulative effect of all mass and energy that came before it.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Friedmann equations — what determine the rate and direction of expansion. The scale factor a(t) evolves according to the balance between matter/radiation density and dark energy.
phase_5.alfs_store: The cosmic microwave background (CMB) — the canonical reference store. Every structure in the universe can be traced back to anisotropies in the CMB. It is the bootstrap store from which all subsequent structure emerged.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Entropy production: the universe's total entropy increases monotonically (the second law of thermodynamics). Each cycle of expansion consumes order and produces disorder.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Initial state: low entropy, high order, quantum coherence. The singularity is a state of maximum constraint and minimum freedom.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Final state (if expansion continues forever): high entropy, low order, heat death. The universe approaches maximum disorder and minimum constraint.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS > 0 — The cosmic Frobenius cycle is entropy-increasing overall. Expansion produces disorder faster than any local collapse can recover order. The universe's round-trip is not closed at the entropy level; it is open, dissipative, and irreversible. The Frobenius identity μ ∘ δ = id holds structurally (the universe can split and fuse), but not thermodynamically (entropy is not conserved). This is the structural correlate of the arrow of time: the universe can return to its initial condition geometrically, but never to its initial entropy state. Time flows forward because entropy flows forward.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → AREV → CLINK → CLINK → FFUSE → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: The Cosmic Frobenis Condition
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(3, 10)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [6] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [7] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [10] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def the_cosmic_frobenis_condition_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The singularity exists as pure potential, before any distinction between spac...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The metric tensor g_μν emerges as the universe's self-description — spacetime...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑚)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Inflation begins. The scale factor a(t) increases exponentially. The universe...)
  -- FSPLIT [3] (gran := 𐑚) (The initial singularity splits into two branches: expansion (EVALT) and contraction (EVALF). The universe's fate bifurcates.) / FFUSE [10] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The expansion branch succeeds. Matter and radiation decouple. Galaxies form. ...)
      -- F-branch (5 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The contraction branch fails (in this universe). Gravity would eventually rev...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (At the critical point (if the universe were to reach maximum expansion and be...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Gravitational collapse occurs locally in regions of high density. Black holes...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Causal structure chains events together. The light cone of the Big Bang inter...)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Causal structure chains events together. The light cone of the Big Bang inter...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [10]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [10] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (If the universe were to contract (the Big Crunch), the two branches would fuse back together. The expansion and contraction phases would reconstitute the singularity. The round-trip would be complete: singularity → expansion → contraction → singularity.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The cosmic microwave background radiation is sealed as the permanent record o...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The event horizon of the observable universe forms the boundary that contains...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def the_cosmic_frobenis_condition_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (the_cosmic_frobenis_condition_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def the_cosmic_frobenis_condition_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (the_cosmic_frobenis_condition_protocol).restrictToEVALF
